# UiHost.IsUiDialectMethodName method

Returns `true` when *name* is one of the verbatim dialect method/notification names — matched byte-for-byte and case-sensitively, so `"UI/Initialize"` or `"ui/Initialize"` do NOT match (spec §26.6, R-26.5-a).

```csharp
public static bool IsUiDialectMethodName(string? name)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| name | The candidate name. |

## Return Value

`true` when a dialect name.
